semantic.role: Defines specific naming convention rules to enforce codebase consistency.
responsibilities: Interface naming: internal interfaces must start with 'I'
Test file naming: test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts

English.purpose: This document establishes a small set of mandatory naming conventions for the ArchSpine project. Its goal is to keep the codebase style uniform, especially across a large monorepo with many contributors and automated tooling.
English.context_and_audience: The document is intended for all developers and automated agents working on the ArchSpine codebase. It lives within the .spine/rules/ folder and is checked by the ArchSpine governance engine during scans and validation runs.
key_takeaways: All internal interfaces in src/types/**/*.ts must be prefixed with 'I' (e.g., IUserRepository). Violations generate a Warning.
All test files under tests/ must use the suffix .test.ts or .spec.ts. Violations produce an Error.
The rules are minimal and focused on naming only—they do not address architecture, layering, or code style outside of naming.
